allow: PowerShell(npx --yes shadcn@latest add button card badge avatar separator --yes 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Hola, soy Luis"\) { "OK: hero presente" }; if \($r.Content -match "Dashboard de Anal"\) { "OK: proyectos presentes" }; if \($r.Content -match "Stack"\) { "OK: stack presente" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Cambiar tema"\) { "OK: selector de tema presente en el navbar" } else { "WARN: no se encontro el selector" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Cambiar tema"\) { "OK: toggle presente" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Proyectos"\) { "OK: contenido ES por defecto" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "picsum"\) { "OK: imagenes en las cards" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(git status 2>&1 | Out-String; "---REMOTE---"; git remote -v 2>&1 | Out-String)
